app_name.description: This is the name of the extension, the placeholder $APPNAME$ is used the remaining strings.

toggle_button_tooltip_enable.description: text shown when user hovers mouse over Markdown Toggle button

toggle_button_tooltip_disable.description: text shown when user hovers mouse over Markdown Toggle button

upgrade_notification_text.description: Text on the notification shown when Markdown Here has been updated

forgot_to_render_back_button.description: Text on the Back (cancel) button of the prompt that's shown when it's detected that a user may have forgotten to render the Markdown in their email

forgot_to_render_prompt_close_hover.description: Text that shows when the user hovers over the 'X' that will close the prompt

forgot_to_render_prompt_info.message: It looks like you wrote this email in Markdown but forgot to make it pretty.
forgot_to_render_prompt_info.description: Informational part of the prompt that's shown when it's detected that a user may have forgotten to render the Markdown in their email

forgot_to_render_prompt_question.description: Question part of the prompt that's shown when it's detected that a user may have forgotten to render the Markdown in their email

forgot_to_render_send_button.description: Text on the Send (continue) button of the prompt that's shown when it's detected that a user may have forgotten to render the Markdown in their email

set_math_api_url.message: Set an API URL for Math rendering in Settings.
set_math_api_url.description: A message displayed when math rendering is set to use Gchart but an invalid URL is set.

reset_preview.description: Context menu item displayed on the compose action that resets the live preview to a usable state.

edit_as_new_markdown_message.description: Context menu item displayed from message list

options_page__interface_mode.description: Label for selecting the user interface mode (eg. modern or classic modes)

options_page__forgot_to_render_label2.description: Label for the checkbox that enables the forgot-to-render feature

options_page__forgot_to_render_2.message:
When you send an email, this checks the content to see if it looks like you wrote it in Markdown,
but forgot to render it (i.e., click 'Markdown Toggle') before sending.
This may need to be disabled if it interferes with your ability to send email.

options_page__use_bodytext_format_label.message: Use Body Text format in composer
options_page__use_bodytext_format_label.description: Label for the checkbox that enables the Body Text format

use_paragraph_setting_label.message: Use Paragraph format instead of Body Text by default
use_paragraph_setting_label.description: This string must match the Fluent string 'default-format-label' in preferences.ftl

options_page__use_bodytext_format_descri.message: This add-on works best when “$PREF_STRING$” is disabled in Thunderbird's Settings. Enable this option to apply the recommended setting.
options_page__use_bodytext_format_descri.description: Description of the 'Use Body Text Format' option.

options_page__features_title.description: Heading for a set of options to enable or disable various features of the Markdown rendering

options_page__gfm_line_breaks_enabled_la.description: Label for the checkbox that enables the support of 'Github-flavored Markdown' line breaks.

options_page__smart_replacements_enabled.description: Label for enabling the smart replacements feature

options_page__smart_replacements_2.message: Smart replacements include: unicode quotes, en- and em-dash, ellipses, and arrow replacements
options_page__smart_replacements_2.description: An explanation of what smart replacements are

options_page__emoji_autocomplete_enabled.description: Label for enabling an auto-complete popup for emoji shortcodes

options_page__tex_math_texzilla_label.description: Label for tex math rendering option

options_page__tex_math_texzilla_label-Ti.message: Math formulae are rendered with TeXZilla.js using the browser canvas. No network request is sent.
options_page__tex_math_texzilla_label-Ti.description: description how math is rendered when TexZilla option is selected

options_page__tex_math_codecogs_label.message: Math rendering using CodeCogs Equation Rendering API
options_page__tex_math_codecogs_label.description: Label for CodeCogs math rendering option

options_page__tex_math_codecogs_customiz.message: To generate the image for the formula, a request is sent to CodeCogs. That effectively means that you are sharing your formula with CodeCogs. It also means that recipients of your message will be making a request to CodeCogs to have the image rendered.
options_page__tex_math_codecogs_customiz.description: one of the CodeCogs TeX math privacy concerns

options_page__tex_math_codecogs_customiz.message: For render customization options, see the $LINK$CodeCogs documentation$CLOSELINK$ for this service.
options_page__tex_math_codecogs_customiz.description: Link to CodeCogs documentation - do not translate $PLACEHOLDERS$

options_page__tex_math_codecogs_customiz.message: A good resource for creating TeX formulae is the $LINK$CodeCogs Equation Editor$CLOSELINK$.
options_page__tex_math_codecogs_customiz.description: More info about CodeCogs - do not translate $PLACEHOLDERS$

options_page__buglink_description.message: Create links to bug or issue trackers like `#12345`. The fields below are used to template the URL and text of the links.

options_page__buglink_url.description: Template field for creating bug/issue links

options_page__disable_paragraph_format.message: Disable Paragraph format in Thunderbird settings.

options_page__start_new_message_toggle.message: Start a new email message. Toggle the composer to markdown mode with the action button on the format toolbar.

options_page__type_some_markdown.message: Type some Markdown into the email. Try this:

options_page__compose_live_preview.message: The live preview updates as you write your message.

options_page__toggle_hotkey.description: A step suggestion in the basic usage instructions

options_page__syntax_highlighting_theme_.description: label for the syntax highlighting theme combo box

options_page__preview_title.description: section title for the Markdown preview section

options_page__create_gitlab_issue.description: Text linking to issue creation page

options_page__issue_debug_info.message: The following debug info can be used:
options_page__issue_debug_info.description: header for some extension debug information

options_page__debug_copy_clipboard.description: button for copying debug information to the clipboard

options_page__translate.description: Used in a link to open Locale Maker

options_page__localemaker_1.message: Locale Maker is blatantly copied from the FireMonkey extension for Firefox.

options_page__localemaker_2.message: Thank you to erosman for its creation.

options_page__changes_saved.description: message that shows when user changes have been saved

options_page__invalid_hotkey.description: message that shows when an invalid hotkey combination was entered

options_page__reset_button.description: used for resetting certain options to the default
